title: Excelize-to-MoonBit port roadmap
description: High-level tracking epic for the Excelize (Go) to MoonBit port. Subissues capture each major phase and quality gates.

title: Scope and prioritization
description: Identify Excelize feature areas, map to MoonBit packages, and set initial priorities using bd.

title: Catalog Excelize features and package map
description: List Excelize feature areas and map them to MoonBit packages/directories (workbook, worksheet, styles, shared strings, drawings, charts, etc.).
notes: Documented feature map and proposed package layout in docs/porting-plan.md.

title: Prioritize milestones and dependencies
description: Create initial milestone ordering and dependency links in bd so bd ready reflects the intended build sequence.
notes: Set dependencies to enforce milestone order (core foundation before feature slices; feature slices before stabilization).

title: Core file format foundation
description: Implement ZIP + OOXML package basics and minimal workbook/worksheet read-write paths.

title: ZIP container read/write
description: Implement ZIP parsing and emission needed for OOXML packages (file entries, compression, metadata).
notes: Progress update: data descriptor + zip64 read tests added.

title: Deflate decode (fixed + dynamic Huffman)
description: Implement full raw deflate decoding (fixed and dynamic Huffman blocks) to read typical XLSX files.
notes: Implemented full deflate decode (stored/fixed/dynamic Huffman) with table-based decoder and tests.

title: Deflate encode (writer support)
description: Add deflate compression for zip writer (at least fixed Huffman) and tests.
notes: Implemented fixed-Huffman deflate encoder (literal-only) and wired writer to method 8; added encode and zip roundtrip tests.

title: Zip64 and data descriptor support
description: Add Zip64 sizes/headers and data descriptor handling for large or streaming files.
notes: Reader now handles data descriptor flag and zip64 extra sizes/offsets; added tests for descriptor + zip64 extra. Zip64/data descriptor writing remains.

title: Deflate LZ77 compression (match finder)
description: Add length/distance encoding for deflate writer to produce compressed output (beyond literal-only fixed Huffman).

title: Zip64/data descriptor write support
description: Add Zip64 and data descriptor emission in zip writer for large or streaming files.

title: OOXML package scaffolding
description: Implement content types, relationships, and package manifest handling for workbook parts.

title: Workbook/worksheet/shared strings/styles minimal path
description: Implement minimal data model and read/write path for workbook, worksheet, shared strings, and styles.

title: UTF-16 string handling audit and helpers
description: Define string/byte conversion utilities and audit all text indexing/slicing to account for MoonBit UTF-16 strings vs Go UTF-8; add helpers where needed.
notes: Added UTF-16/UTF-8 index helpers + error types, and snapshot tests for offsets/edge cases.

title: Core roundtrip tests and fixtures
description: Add snapshot/roundtrip tests for minimal open/save, including shared strings and styles.

title: Feature slices
description: Incrementally add Excelize features with MoonBit APIs and tests.

title: Cell access APIs
description: Implement get/set cell value APIs and basic types (number, string, bool, date) with tests.

title: Row/column operations
description: Implement row/column insert/delete, dimension updates, and range utilities with tests.

title: Formulas and calc chain
description: Add formula parsing/serialization and calc chain handling with snapshots.

title: Images and drawings
description: Implement image insertion/extraction and drawing relationships with tests.

title: Charts
description: Implement chart creation/serialization and related XML structures with tests.

title: Data validation and conditional formatting
description: Implement validation rules and conditional formatting serialization with snapshots.

title: Stabilization and quality gates
description: API review, tests, docs, and tooling checks before release.

title: Public API review and .mbti updates
description: Review public APIs for idiomatic MoonBit design; confirm generated .mbti changes are expected.
close_reason: Completed stabilization tasks (API review, docs/tests, quality gates, UTF-16 coverage, regression harness)

title: Docs and examples
description: Add README.mbt.md usage examples and docstring tests for key APIs.
close_reason: Completed stabilization tasks (API review, docs/tests, quality gates, UTF-16 coverage, regression harness)

title: Quality gates (moon check/test/info/fmt)
description: Run full MoonBit checks/tests and update snapshots; ensure linting and formatting pass.
close_reason: Completed stabilization tasks (API review, docs/tests, quality gates, UTF-16 coverage, regression harness)

title: UTF-16 string edge-case tests
description: Add tests for string indexing/slicing, shared strings encoding, and XML text handling to cover MoonBit UTF-16 behavior vs Go UTF-8 assumptions.
close_reason: Completed stabilization tasks (API review, docs/tests, quality gates, UTF-16 coverage, regression harness)

title: Performance/regression test harness
description: Define performance baselines (open/save large files) and regression tests for critical APIs.
close_reason: Completed stabilization tasks (API review, docs/tests, quality gates, UTF-16 coverage, regression harness)

title: Remaining Excelize feature parity
description: Implement remaining Excelize features not yet covered: styles/number formats, merges/tables/sparklines, pivots/slicers, streaming, VML shapes, encryption/metadata.

title: Styles and number formats
description: Design public APIs for styles/number formats (fonts, fills, borders, numFmt) and implement read/write + tests.
close_reason: Implemented styles/number formats with read/write and tests

title: Merged cells and dimensions
description: Implement merge cell ranges, update dimensions, serialize/parse mergedCells blocks with tests.
close_reason: Implemented merge cells + dimension serialization with read/write and tests

title: Tables and structured references
description: Add table definitions, table XML parts, structured references, and roundtrip tests.
close_reason: Implemented table parts, relationships, read/write, and tests

title: Sparklines
description: Implement sparkline XML generation and worksheet integration with tests.
close_reason: Implemented sparkline groups with read/write and tests

title: Pivot tables and slicers
description: Implement pivot table parts, cache, and slicer relationships with tests.

title: Streaming read/write
description: Add streaming writer/reader APIs for large XLSX files; include performance tests.

title: VML shapes and legacy drawings
description: Implement VML shape parts and worksheet relationships with tests for legacy drawings.

title: Encryption and document properties
description: Implement workbook encryption/decryption hooks and editable core/app properties with tests.

title: Encryption support for OOXML packages
description: Implement XLSX encryption/decryption (standard/agile). Update read/write to detect encrypted packages and add tests with encrypted fixtures.

title: Agile encryption verifier check
description: Investigate why agile_verify_password mismatches on encryptSHA1.xlsx; align with ECMA-376 verifier/HMAC flow and/or implement dataIntegrity HMAC validation instead of zip-header fallback.

title: mbtexcel-dai.8: Remaining financial/date formulas parity
description: Implement remaining Excelize financial/date functions in formula_eval (INTRATE/DISC/PRICE/YIELD/COUP*/ODD* and related tests).

title: Excelize parity audit and gap list
description: Audit mbtexcel public API and feature coverage against excelize, identify any missing features or behavioral gaps, and open follow-up issues with tests.

title: Excelize parity gap implementation
description: Track remaining Excelize API gaps identified in parity audit.

title: Sheet management: rename/delete/active/visibility
description: Implement worksheet management APIs: set sheet name, delete/move/copy sheets, active sheet index, and visibility (hidden/very hidden), with XML write/read and tests.

title: Cell typed setters + type query + merge wrappers
description: Add Excelize parity for SetCellBool/Int/Uint/Float/Str/Default, GetCellType, MergeCell/UnmergeCell/GetMergeCells wrappers; align naming between Workbook/Worksheet APIs.
acceptance_criteria: Workbook and Worksheet expose typed setters + get_cell_type; merge_cell/unmerge_cell wrappers added; tests cover bool/int/uint/float/str/default and type detection, plus merge wrapper behavior.
close_reason: Implemented typed setters, get_cell_type, merge wrappers + tests

title: File IO + stream API parity
description: Add Excelize-style file/stream helpers: OpenFile/OpenReader/Save/SaveAs/WriteTo/WriteToBuffer/Close and zip reader/writer wrappers.
acceptance_criteria: Public APIs for file/stream open/save/close exist, covered by tests reading/writing temp files and Bytes; zip reader/writer wrappers documented.

title: Workbook metadata + protection parity
description: Implement Get/Set DocProps/AppProps/CustomProps/CalcProps/WorkbookProps/DefaultFont and ProtectWorkbook/UnprotectWorkbook parity.
acceptance_criteria: Workbook exposes get/set for core/app/custom/calc/workbook props and default font, plus workbook protection APIs with tests verifying round-trip.
close_reason: Implemented workbook/calculation props, custom properties, default font, and workbook protection with tests

title: Sheet view/panes/dimension + chart sheets
description: Add sheet view and pane APIs (Get/SetSheetView, Get/SetPanes), sheet dimension APIs, grouping/ungrouping sheets, chart-sheet creation, and sheet search helpers.
acceptance_criteria: Sheet view/pane and dimension getters/setters exist with tests; group/ungroup and chart sheet creation covered.

title: Row/col iterators + duplicate row parity
description: Implement Rows/Cols iterators and DuplicateRow/DuplicateRowTo wrappers; align RemoveRow/RemoveCol semantics and tests for iteration APIs.
acceptance_criteria: Rows/Cols iterators exposed with tests; duplicate row helpers behave like Excelize; remove row/col behavior documented.

title: Data validation + conditional format parity
description: Add structured DataValidation API, conditional format setters/getters, and ignored error handling to match Excelize.
acceptance_criteria: Public APIs for data validations and conditional formats exist; tests cover add/get/delete and XML output parity; ignored errors supported.

title: Shapes/form controls/slicer/pivot parity
description: Implement AddShape/AddFormControl/GetFormControls/DeleteFormControl, AddSlicer/DeleteSlicer/GetSlicers, AddPivotTable/DeletePivotTable/GetPivotTables and related XML handling.
acceptance_criteria: Shapes/form controls/slicers/pivot tables APIs exist with tests covering add/get/delete and XML outputs.

title: Style API parity (NewStyle/GetStyle/ConditionalStyle)
description: Expose Excelize-style style helpers: NewStyle, GetStyle, NewConditionalStyle, GetConditionalStyle and align with existing Style struct and add_style.
acceptance_criteria: Style helper APIs exist with tests verifying style round-trip and conditional style lookup.

title: VBA project parity
description: Implement AddVBAProject support for embedding VBA projects (where supported).
acceptance_criteria: Workbook exposes AddVBAProject or equivalent; tests cover embedding and persistence.

title: Row/column dimensions, visibility, insert/remove
description: Add row/column dimension support: width/height, outline levels, visibility, styles, insert/remove rows/cols with range adjustments. Include tests.
close_reason: Implemented row/col dimensions, visibility, insert/remove ops with read/write + tests.

title: Typed cell values and formatted reads
description: Implement typed setters/getters (int/float/bool/datetime), cell type handling, and formatted value retrieval aligned with Excelize APIs. Add tests for number formats and date handling.

title: Hyperlinks, rich text, comments
description: Add hyperlink set/get, rich text runs, and comments (VML) APIs with tests.

title: AutoFilter, table ops, picture ops
description: Add AutoFilter APIs, table listing/deletion, and picture retrieval/deletion aligned with Excelize behavior. Include tests.

title: Sheet properties, page layout, defined names
description: Implement sheet-level properties (page layout/margins, header/footer, protection, background, defined names, page breaks) and tests.

title: Formula evaluation (CalcCellValue)
description: Implement formula parsing/evaluation parity for CalcCellValue and related helpers, with tests matching Excelize behaviors.

title: Implement lookup/indirect formulas
description: Port lookup-related functions from excelize: LOOKUP (vector/array), XLOOKUP, INDIRECT, ADDRESS, plus needed helpers/tests.

title: Implement text B-variants and UNIQUE
description: Port remaining text functions from excelize: DBCS and *B variants (LEFTB/RIGHTB/MIDB/LENB/FINDB/SEARCHB/REPLACEB) plus UNIQUE; add coverage for UTF-16 behavior.
close_reason: Implemented text B-variants, DBCS stub, and UNIQUE with tests

title: Investigate encryption_wbtest InvalidPassword
description:
Full moon test run fails at xlsx/encryption_wbtest.mbt:438 (read encrypted agile workbook) with InvalidPassword. Repro: run [bobzhang/mbtexcel] test xlsx/encryption_wbtest.mbt:438 ("read encrypted agile workbook") failed: InvalidPassword
Total tests: 107, passed: 106, failed: 1.. Check whether test fixture or decrypt flow regressed, and align expected password/fixtures.
